synopsis: As Star Wars Rebels continues we meet the show's deadliest bad guys! Agent Kallus, the Inquisitor and, of course, the Imperial stormtroopers take center stage as we uncover their sinister plans! Will the rebellion be crushed before they've even begun? We'll also be looking at concept artist Amy Beth Christenson's amazing contribution to the show. For the more literary minded, we look at 10 legendary ladies from Star Wars fiction and have an all-new, exclusive story set in the Star Wars universe!
title: Insider #153
